ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., deep learning, reinforcement learning) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "training_script" TEXT /* Training script used to train the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Current version of the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "model_category" TEXT /* Category of the model (e.g., image classification, game playing) */,
  "model_tags" TEXT /* Tags for the model for easier search and filtering */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  "model_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the model was trained (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_architectures" (
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architecture */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that uses this architecture */,
  "architecture_name" TEXT /* Name of the architecture */,
  "architecture_description" TEXT /* Description of the architecture */,
  "architecture_version" TEXT /* Version of the architecture */,
  "architecture_status" TEXT /* Status of the architecture (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architecture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_architectures_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that uses this hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "hyperparameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that this metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., %, units) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that this version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "version_approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "version_approved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_version_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("version_approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arcs" (
  "arc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arc */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that uses this arc */,
  "arc_name" TEXT /* Name of the arc */,
  "arc_description" TEXT /* Description of the arc */,
  "arc_version" TEXT /* Version of the arc */,
  "arc_status" TEXT /* Status of the arc (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arcs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capacities" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity */,
  "arc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arc that this capacity belongs to */,
  "capacity_value" INTEGER /* Value of the capacity */,
  "capacity_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the capacity (e.g., units) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacities_arc_id FOREIGN KEY ("arc_id") REFERENCES arcs ("arc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "arc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arc that this frequency belongs to */,
  "frequency_value" INTEGER /* Value of the frequency */,
  "frequency_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the frequency (e.g., Hz) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequencies_arc_id FOREIGN KEY ("arc_id") REFERENCES arcs ("arc_id")
)
